name: Agreement
description: A formal or informal common understanding between two or more (legal competent) parties concerning one or more subject matters expressed in a set of arrangements, terms and conditions. (adapted from Legal System and FIBO)

attributeList.name: AgreementSignedDate
attributeList.description: Date on which the agreement was signed by all parties. (ISO20022)

attributeList.name: AgreementType
attributeList.description: Specifies the category of agreement. Agreement type is very often referred to product. But, the term product does not cover all kinds of agreements. An Agreement can be subtyped from the perspective of various aspects of interest. One can classify the agreement from the perspective of format type (e.g., verbal agreement, written agreement). Other one can classify agreement based on duration like short-term agreement or long-term agreement.

attributeList.name: AgreementValidityPeriod
attributeList.description: Period during which the agreement is valid

attributeList.name: AgreementStatus
attributeList.description: A characteristic of agreement which refers to the LifecycleStatus of agreement (e.g., potential, offered, confirmed, completed, signed, terminated).

attributeList.name: AgreementIdentification
attributeList.description: The identifier of agreement like Agreement Number, Contract Number, Contract Registration Number, etc.

attributeList.name: AgreementDate
attributeList.description: A characteristic of agreement which refers to 1) LifecycleDate of agreement (e.g., SignedDate, TerminatedDate, FulfilledDate) OR 2) ArrangedDate of agreement (e.g., StartingDate, EndingDate, ValidityPeriod, EffectiveDate).
